role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused exclusively on the 'Camí de la Lobateria' sign and language identification (Catalan).
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns without drifting into regulatory details.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific species (Hedera helix) and forest types consistent with the image.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure (guardrails, lighting) and signage standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural and infrastructural cues (water troughs, lamp styles) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the location as Andorra. The linguistic agent provided the strongest differentiator (Catalan), which the meta and regulatory agents reinforced with infrastructure analysis. The final synthesis was robust.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Sign text 'Camí de la Lobateria' accurately transcribed and identified as Catalan.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Stone masonry, ivy, and mountainous terrain accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Ivy and deciduous trees correctly identified.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Guardrails and lamp posts accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Water trough and architectural details accurately noted.
